pattern.name: sidebar_navigation
pattern.description: Persistent sidebar with collapsible tree structure for hierarchical categories

component.name: SidebarNav
component.behavior: - Renders hierarchical category tree - Supports expand/collapse for each section - Highlights active page with visual indicator - Persists expansion state in localStorage

component.name: NavCategory
component.behavior: - Grouped navigation items under a category header - Chevron icon rotates on expand/collapse - Smooth height animation for children

component.name: NavLink
component.behavior: - Displays topic link with optional badge (NEW, UPDATED) - Hover state with subtle background - Active state with accent color border

pattern.name: contextual_panel
pattern.description: Right-side panel showing table of contents, related topics, and code references

component.name: ContextualPanel
component.behavior: - Sticky positioning that follows scroll - Collapses to floating button on mobile - Smooth transition when scrolling past content

component.name: TableOfContents
component.behavior: - Parses H2/H3 headings from content - Highlights active section on scroll - Smooth scroll to section on click

component.name: RelatedTopics
component.behavior: - Shows 3-5 related topic cards - Excludes current topic from list - Includes category context in link

component.name: CodeReferences
component.behavior: - Lists code examples on current page - Shows file paths with copy button - Displays inline preview on hover

pattern.name: ai_search
pattern.description: AI-powered search system with Minimax API integration

component.name: SearchModal
component.behavior: - Opens with Cmd+K / Ctrl+K - Displays recent searches - Shows search suggestions as typing - Modal overlay with backdrop blur

component.name: SearchInput
component.behavior: - Debounced search (300ms) - Shows loading spinner during search - Clear button when has value - Keyboard navigation for results

component.name: SearchResults
component.behavior: - Groups results by category - Shows relevance score indicator - Displays snippet with highlighted matches - Includes breadcrumb path for navigation

search_features.feature: Natural language query parsing ("how do I configure X")
Filtering by category and content type

pattern.name: theme_system
pattern.description: Dark/light theme support with persistent user preferences

pattern.name: keyboard_shortcuts
pattern.description: Keyboard navigation shortcuts for power users

pattern.name: code_playground
pattern.description: Interactive code playgrounds for trying examples

features.feature: Live code editing with syntax highlighting

pattern.name: topic_navigation
pattern.description: Previous/next topic navigation at bottom of each page

implementation.logic: - Calculate previous and next topics based on navigation hierarchy - Use flat list ordered by position/order in hierarchy - Include category context in navigation display - Show keyboard shortcuts in tooltip
